message:
feat: Enable KV cache quantization in server mode (Dark Arts #1)

Previously, the server was loading models but NOT passing the kv_type
to the scheduler, so the KV cache defaulted to FP16 even when the
profile specified Q8_0 or Q4_0.

Changes:
- Added kv_type option to SchedulerOptions
- Server now passes profile's kv_type to scheduler via GGML type
- Under critical memory pressure: force Q4_0 (75% memory savings)
- Under high pressure: upgrade FP16 to Q8_0 (50% memory savings)

For a 32B model with 2048 context:
- FP16 KV cache: ~1.8 GB
- Q8_0 KV cache: ~0.9 GB (50% savings)
- Q4_0 KV cache: ~0.45 GB (75% savings)

This is the "low hanging fruit" for fitting large models in 16GB RAM.
